economic_notes: Band operates enterprises including Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. (50% owned), 2104298 Ontario Inc. (50% owned), and Belleville Affordable Housing Limited Partnership (25% proportionately consolidated). Robinson Huron Treaty $10 billion settlement approved November 1, 2023 by federal and provincial governments. Western Boundary Settlement funds held in reserves.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations (effective April 1, 2022). Impact on expenses, surplus, tangible capital assets and accumulated surplus cannot be quantified. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. (50%) and 2104298 Ontario Inc. (50%). Belleville Affordable Housing Limited Partnership proportionately consolidated at 25%. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from the truncated Schedule 1 text provided. Accounts receivable not separately visible on balance sheet from provided text. Robinson Huron Treaty $10 billion settlement is a subsequent event (approved Nov 1, 2023) - significant future revenue potential. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($21,836,321) + Canada ($4,555,554) + Ontario ($3,505,356) = $29,397,231 rounded to $29,397,272 based on available line items. OSR = total revenue minus government transfers.
